Flo Ruit is a hybrid strain that is believed to have its roots in the widely popular Flo strain. Flo, originally bred by DJ Short, is a cross between a Purple Thai and an Afghani Indica. The Flo Ruit strain inherits the best qualities of its parent strains, resulting in a balanced hybrid that offers both cerebral stimulation and physical relaxation.

Flo Ruit is known for its balanced effects, making it suitable for a variety of occasions and purposes. The high typically begins with a gentle cerebral uplift, characterized by enhanced creativity, focus, and euphoria. Users often report feeling more sociable and talkative, making this strain a great choice for social gatherings or artistic endeavors.

As the high progresses, the physical effects begin to take hold. A soothing wave of relaxation washes over the body, easing tension and stress without causing sedation. description: These official sized Poker playing cards are designed with our Exotic brand colors and style. Wow your friends with this stylish deck of cards. Beautifully designed with rainbow foil siding, these cards really stand out, be the first one of your friends to own a deck today.

Prepared with a 100% cotton blend to keep you feeling comfortable.

Neatly monogrammed on the back with a colorful Limited Edition shirt count arm tag added to the side sleeve to provide a special touch.

title: Crossbody Bags
description: Introducing our Core Logo Cross-body Bag, perfect for anyone constantly on the move.

Crafted from high-quality materials, this bag is built to withstand daily and rough wear. The interior provides plenty of space for all your essentials, and the adjustable cross-body strap offers a comfortable and secure fit.
Take advantage of the chance to add some style to your life. Our logo-filled Cross-body Bag makes a great must-have for any cannabis aficionado.
• Ultra-Storage and Functionality
• Exceptional Comfort, Durability and Fashion-Forward Design
